member.name: T:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ContainerService
member.summary: Container Service using WMI for Hyper-V isolated containers.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ContainerService.Create(System.String,HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest)
member.summary: Creates a Hyper-V isolated container using WMI.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ContainerService.CreateContainerConfiguration(HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest)
member.summary: Creates WMI container configuration.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ContainerService.CreateContainerResourceSettings(HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateContainerRequest)
member.summary: Creates container resource settings.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ContainerService.GetVirtualSystemManagementService
member.summary: Gets the virtual system management service.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ContainerService.WaitForJob(System.Management.ManagementObject)
member.summary: Waits for a WMI job to complete.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ContainerService.IsContainerPresent(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a WMI container exists by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ContainerService.ListContainers
member.summary: Lists all WMI containers.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ContainerService.GetContainerStatus(System.Management.ManagementObject)
member.summary: Gets the status of a WMI container.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ContainerService.StartContainer(System.String)
member.summary: Starts a WMI container by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ContainerService.StopContainer(System.String)
member.summary: Stops a WMI container by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ContainerService.TerminateContainer(System.String)
member.summary: Terminates a WMI container by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ContainerService.PauseContainer(System.String)
member.summary: Pauses a WMI container by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ContainerService.ResumeContainer(System.String)
member.summary: Resumes a WMI container by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ContainerService.GetContainerProperties(System.String)
member.summary: Gets properties of a WMI container by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ContainerService.ModifyContainer(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Modifies a WMI container by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ContainerService.ExecuteContainerStateChange(System.String,System.UInt32,System.String)
member.summary: Executes a state change operation on a container.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ContainerService.GetContainer(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a container by name.

member.name: T:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.HostInfoService
member.summary: Service for retrieving host information, hardware, system, performance, and recent tasks. Uses WMI queries to gather data for the Host dashboard.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.HostInfoService.GetHostHardwareInfoAsync
member.summary: Retrieves hardware information for the host.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.HostInfoService.GetSystemInfoAsync
member.summary: Retrieves system information (OS details).

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.HostInfoService.GetPerformanceSummaryAsync
member.summary: Retrieves current performance summary (CPU, Memory, Storage usage).

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.HostInfoService.GetRecentTasksAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves recent Hyper-V tasks/jobs.
member.param: Number of recent tasks to return (default: 10).

member.name: T:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ImageManagementService
member.summary: WMI-based implementation of Image Management Service Provides virtual media management operations using Hyper-V WMI APIs

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.MetricsService.QueryMetricCollectionEnabled(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Queries whether metric collection is enabled for a given VM and metric definition. Based on Microsoft Metrics/EnumerateMetrics.cs QueryMetricCollectionEnabledForVirtualMachine.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.MetricsService.EnumerateDiscreteMetricsForVm(System.String)
member.summary: Enumerates discrete metrics that compose aggregate metrics for a VM. Based on Microsoft Metrics/EnumerateMetrics.cs EnumerateDiscreteMetricsForVm.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.MetricsService.EnumerateMetricsForResourcePool(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Enumerates metrics for a given resource pool. Based on Microsoft Metrics/EnumerateMetrics.cs EnumerateMetricsForResourcePool.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.MetricsService.EnableMetricsCollection(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Enables metric collection for a VM using the Msvm_MetricService::ControlMetrics method. Based on Microsoft Metrics/ControlMetrics.cs EnableMetricsForVirtualMachine.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.MetricsService.ControlMetrics(System.String,System.String,System.UInt32,System.Management.ManagementScope)
member.summary: Acts as a wrapper around the MetricService::ControlMetrics WMI method. It is used to enable, disable, or reset metrics. Based on Microsoft Metrics/ControlMetrics.cs ControlMetrics method.
member.param: The path to the managed element for which to control metrics. This can be the path to a Cim_ResourceAllocationSettingData derived class, a Msvm_ComputerSystem, or a Cim_ResourcePool derived class. Null indicates all virtual machines.
The path to the metric definition to control metrics for. Null indicates all definitions.
The MetricOperation (2=Enable, 3=Disable, 4=Reset).
The ManagementScope to use to connect to WMI.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.MetricsService.GetMetricService(System.Management.ManagementScope)
member.summary: Gets the metric service. Based on Microsoft Metrics/MetricUtilities.cs GetMetricService method.
member.param: The ManagementScope to use to connect to WMI.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ReplicationService.IsVmPresent(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a VM exists for replication operations.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ReplicationService.SaveVm(System.String)
member.summary: Saves VM state.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ReplicationService.ModifyVmAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Modifies VM configuration settings.
member.param: The name of the virtual machine to modify.
JSON string containing configuration parameters to modify.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
member.exception: Thrown when VM is not found or modification fails.
Thrown when configuration parameters are invalid.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ResourcePoolsService.ListResourcePools
member.summary: Lists all resource pools with basic information.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ResourcePoolsService.GetResourcePool(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets detailed information for a specific resource pool. Based on Microsoft ResourcePools/MsvmResourcePool.cs DisplayResourcePool and DisplayPoolVerbose.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ResourcePoolsService.GetChildPools(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Lists child pools for a given resource pool. Based on Microsoft ResourcePools/MsvmResourcePool.cs DisplayChildPools using Msvm_ElementAllocatedFromPool.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.ResourcePoolsService.GetParentPools(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Lists parent pools for a given resource pool. Based on Microsoft ResourcePools/MsvmResourcePool.cs DisplayParentPools using Msvm_ElementAllocatedFromPool.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.StorageService.GetImageManagementService(System.Management.ManagementScope)
member.summary: Gets the Msvm_ImageManagementService instance.
member.param: The ManagementScope to use to connect to WMI.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.StorageService.CreateVirtualHardDiskSettingData(System.Management.ManagementScope,HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVhdRequest)
member.summary: Creates a new Msvm_VirtualHardDiskSettingData instance with the specified parameters.
member.param: The ManagementScope to use to connect to WMI.
The VHD creation request parameters.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.StorageService.GetDefaultStorageAllocationSettingData(System.Management.ManagementScope)
member.summary: Gets the default storage allocation setting data for virtual hard disks. Uses the Microsoft recommended approach from virtualization samples.
member.param: The ManagementScope to use to connect to WMI.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.StorageService.GetSuitableControllerWithAddress(System.Management.ManagementObject)
member.summary: Gets a suitable controller path and address for attaching storage devices. Prefers SCSI controllers over IDE controllers and finds the next available address. Based on Microsoft documentation: SCSI controllers support up to 256 drives.
member.param: The virtual machine settings object.
member.returns: Controller information including path and next available address.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.StorageService.GetNextAvailableAddress(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String}},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Gets the next available address on a controller for attaching a new drive. Based on Microsoft documentation: SCSI supports up to 256 devices, IDE supports 2 per channel.
member.param: The controller path to check.
Dictionary of used addresses per controller.
True if this is a SCSI controller, false for IDE.
member.returns: The next available address, or null if no slots available.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.StorageService.HasAvailableSlots(System.Management.ManagementObject)
member.summary: Checks if a controller has available slots for attaching additional drives.
member.param: The controller resource allocation setting data.
member.returns: True if the controller has available slots, false otherwise.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.StorageService.FindVirtualHardDiskSetting(System.Management.ManagementObject,System.String)
member.summary: Finds the storage allocation setting data for a specific VHD path on a virtual machine.
member.param: The virtual machine object.
The path of the VHD to find.
member.returns: The storage allocation setting data for the VHD, or null if not found.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.StorageService.ListStorageDevicesAsync
member.summary: Lists all fixed storage devices (local drives) with their details.
member.returns: A list of storage device information.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.StorageService.GetSuitableVhdLocationsAsync(System.Int64)
member.summary: Browses filesystems to find suitable locations for VHDX storage. Returns drives with sufficient free space and suggested paths.
member.param: Minimum free space required in GB (default: 10).
member.returns: A list of suitable storage locations.

member.name: T:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmCreationService
member.summary: VM Creation Service using Hyper-V WMI API for proper VM registration.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmCreationService.CreateHyperVVm(System.String,HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest)
member.summary: Creates a VM using pure Hyper-V WMI API based on Microsoft samples.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmCreationService.CreateVmSettingsText(System.String,System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Creates VM settings text in WMI DTD format based on Microsoft Generation2VM sample.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmCreationService.ConfigureVmResourcesWmi(System.Management.ManagementScope,System.Management.ManagementObject,HyperV.Contracts.Models.CreateVmRequest)
member.summary: Configures VM resources using Microsoft WMI patterns.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmCreationService.CreateAndAttachVhd(System.Management.ManagementScope,System.Management.ManagementObject,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates and attaches VHD using pure WMI based on Microsoft Storage samples.

member.name: T:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService
member.summary: Comprehensive WMI VM Service providing all VM operations using Hyper-V WMI API.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.ListVms
member.summary: Lists all VMs in WMI.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.IsVmPresent(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a VM exists in WMI.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.GetVmProperties(System.String)
member.summary: Gets VM properties and status.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.StartVm(System.String)
member.summary: Starts a VM using WMI.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.StopVm(System.String)
member.summary: Stops a VM using WMI.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.TerminateVm(System.String)
member.summary: Terminates a VM using WMI.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.PauseVm(System.String)
member.summary: Pauses a VM using WMI.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.ResumeVm(System.String)
member.summary: Resumes a VM using WMI.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.ModifyVmConfiguration(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String,System.Nullable{System.Boolean},System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Modifies VM configuration.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.ListVmSnapshots(System.String)
member.summary: Lists VM snapshots.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.CreateVmSnapshot(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a VM snapshot.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.DeleteVmSnapshot(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Deletes a VM snapshot.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.RevertVmToSnapshot(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Reverts VM to snapshot.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.GetVmMemoryStatus(System.String)
member.summary: Gets VM memory status.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.GetSlpDataRoot(System.String)
member.summary: Gets SLP data root.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.ModifySlpDataRoot(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Modifies SLP data root (configuration data root path for the VM).

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.GetVmGeneration(System.String)
member.summary: Gets VM generation.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.GetSecureBoot(System.String)
member.summary: Gets secure boot status.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.SetSecureBoot(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets secure boot status.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.GetBootOrder(System.String)
member.summary: Gets boot order.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.SetBootOrder(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Sets boot order.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.MigrateVm(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Migrates VM to another host using Msvm_VirtualSystemMigrationService.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.MoveVmStorage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Moves VM storage to a new location (Storage Live Migration).

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.GetVmConnectInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Gets VM connection info for console access.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.GetAppHealth(System.String)
member.summary: Gets application health status.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.CopyFileToGuest(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Copies file to guest VM.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.GetVmStorageDrive(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets details of a specific VM storage drive.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.GetVmStorageDriveState(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets state of a specific VM storage drive.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.ResetVmStorageDrive(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Resets a specific VM storage drive.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.LockVmStorageDriveMedia(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Locks or unlocks media in a specific VM storage drive.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.VmService.GetVmStorageDriveCapabilities(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Gets capabilities of a specific VM storage drive.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.ListPhysicalAdapters
member.summary: Lists physical network adapters for external switch creation.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.ListVirtualSwitches
member.summary: Lists virtual switches using Msvm_VirtualEthernetSwitch. Returns Id (GUID) and Name (ElementName). Never throws; returns empty on errors.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.ListVirtualSwitchesSummary
member.summary: Returns a more detailed list with type, notes and basic metadata.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.CreateVirtualSwitch(System.String,HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.WmiSwitchType,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates a virtual switch (Internal/Private/External supported). Returns the switch Guid. Based on Microsoft CreateSwitch sample from Windows-classic-samples.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.CreatePrivateSwitch(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a private virtual switch (no host access).

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.CreateInternalSwitch(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an internal virtual switch (with host access).

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.CreateExternalOnlySwitch(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates an external-only virtual switch (no host access).

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.CreateExternalSwitch(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Creates an external virtual switch (with host access via internal port).

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.CreateSwitchInternal(System.String,System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Core method to create the switch with specified ports. Based on Microsoft CreateSwitch sample implementation.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.GetEthernetSwitchManagementService
member.summary: Gets the Ethernet Switch Management Service.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.GetHostComputerSystem
member.summary: Gets the host computer system for internal switch ports.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.GetDefaultEthernetPortAllocationSettingData(System.Management.ManagementScope)
member.summary: Gets default Msvm_EthernetPortAllocationSettingData instance.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.WaitForSwitchByName(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Polls for switch by name until found or timeout.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.DeleteVirtualSwitch(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a virtual switch. Based on Microsoft DeleteSwitch sample. Note: This can delete any type of switch. Any ports connected to external or internal resources are also deleted.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.UpdateVirtualSwitch(System.Guid,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Updates basic switch settings (name, notes). Throws on failure.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.ListInstalledExtensions
member.summary: Lists installed Ethernet switch extensions on host.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.SetExtensionEnabledState(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Enables or disables a specific extension on a virtual switch. Based on Microsoft Networking/ManageExtension.cs SetExtensionEnabledState using RequestStateChange.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.SupportsTrunkMode(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a virtual switch supports trunk mode. Based on Microsoft Networking/SupportsTrunkMode.cs using Msvm_EthernetSwitchPortFeatures.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.FindExternalAdapter(System.String)
member.summary: Finds a physical network adapter by name. Returns the ManagementObject or null if not found.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.ListPhysicalAdaptersRaw
member.summary: Lists all physical network adapters from Msvm_ExternalEthernetPort. Returns an enumerable of ManagementObject.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.ConnectVmToSwitch(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Connects a VM to a virtual switch. Based on Microsoft ConnectVmToSwitch sample.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.DisconnectVmFromSwitch(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Disconnects a VM from a virtual switch. Based on Microsoft ConnectVmToSwitch sample.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.AddSyntheticAdapter(System.Management.ManagementObject)
member.summary: Adds a synthetic network adapter to a VM. Based on Microsoft NetworkingUtilities.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.GetDefaultSyntheticAdapter
member.summary: Gets default synthetic adapter settings.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.GetDefaultEthernetPortAllocationSettingData
member.summary: Gets default ethernet port allocation setting data.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.FindEthernetSwitch(System.String)
member.summary: Finds ethernet switch by name.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.FindConnectionsToSwitch(System.Management.ManagementObject,System.Management.ManagementObject)
member.summary: Finds VM connections to a specific switch.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.GetDefaultObjectFromResourcePool(System.Management.ManagementObject)
member.summary: Gets default object from resource pool.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.SetVlanConfiguration(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Int32[])
member.summary: Sets VLAN configuration on a VM's network adapter port. Uses Msvm_EthernetSwitchPortVlanSettingData.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.GetVlanConfiguration(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the current VLAN configuration for a VM's network adapter.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.Services.WmiNetworkService.RemoveVlanConfiguration(System.String)
member.summary: Removes VLAN configuration from a VM's network adapter.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.WmiUtilities.GetHostComputerSystem(System.Management.ManagementScope)
member.summary: Gets the Msvm_ComputerSystem instance that matches the host computer system.
member.param: The ManagementScope to use to connect to WMI.
member.returns: The Msvm_ComputerSystem instance for the host computer system.

member.name: M:HyperV.Core.Wmi.WmiUtilities.GetHostComputerSystem(System.String,System.Management.ManagementScope)
member.summary: Gets the Msvm_ComputerSystem instance for the host computer system with name hostName.
member.param: Host computer system name.
The ManagementScope to use to connect to WMI.
member.returns: The Msvm_ComputerSystem instance for the host computer system.
